reviews.review_description: i loaded into the game in 0.67 seconds and i cried from joy because it loaded so fast. normally when i play a game it takes 6.7 seconds to load but this one loaded so much faster. 100/10 game but it would be 6767/10 if you baked the lighting.
This game makes me want to dookie on all the monkes. I Poopies while playing and it streamed down my leg but i couldnt stop playing. wish i could give another 5 stars for the dookie i took.
